top_signals.title: Robinhood CEO says future of crypto is in real-world assets, not memecoins
top_signals.summary: Vlad Tenev spoke to his belief in the merging of TradFi and crypto when asked if digital assets have entered an "enduring" downturn.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
